info.title: update
info.description: Tool to update NuGet packages. Supports package references and dotnet-tools.json.

options.name: --package
options.description: Package to update. Supports * as wildcard. Will update all unless specified. []

options.name: --exclude-package
options.description: Package to exclude. Supports * as wildcard. []

options.name: --output
options.description: Defaults to "output.md". Explicitly set to fileName.txt to generate plain text instead of markdown. []

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Do not save any changes. [default: False]

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Allow prerelease packages to be installed. [default: False]

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Interaction with user is possible. [default: False]

arguments.name: args
arguments.description: Path to solution or project(s). Defaults to current folder. Target can be a specific file or folder. If target is a folder then all *.csproj-files and dotnet-config.json-files will be processed. [default: .]
